summary: PR-04 (Presentation Recovery arc, code half) replaces the uniform 3-pose swing loop that only read rightward with a data-driven windup -> impact -> recovery cycle aimed at the target vector. Items own an action_profile (windup/impact/recovery fractions, arc, direction mode) in equipment.json, merged with a default in BlockRegistry.action_profile. player_visual computes swing_direction() (mirror-aware for up/down/diagonal aims), swing_progress(), swing_phase_kind(), and draws the pick/axe swing PNGs rotated toward the aim. The sword has no authored frames, so a presentation-only attack_swing timer on player.gd (set on a landed melee hit, never touching damage or timing) drives the same contract. Mining/combat mechanics and frame baselines are unchanged; no image production. presentation_snapshot() gains action_kind, action_item, swing_phase_kind, swing_direction. Waited-GUI smoke 341/341; static validator + capsule_doctor public_repo green.
scope: PR-04 only: equipment action_profiles, block_registry merge, player_visual swing math + rotated draw, presentation-only sword swing on player.gd, three pr04 smoke checks, validator hook, plus HANDOFF/queue/matrix/VARIABLE_MATRIX/README/known_issues docs. No image production; no gameplay/timing change.
next_action: PR-05 (menu and character-selection preview through the shared render path).
